sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: India's Q3 GDP growth likely at 6.2%-6.3%, SBI says - ETCFO
feed.summary: India's economy has shown resilience amid global uncertainties, with SBI projecting GDP growth for Q3 FY25 at 6.2%-6.3% based on high-frequency indicators. A stable rural economy, consistent wage growth, and strong agricultural performance have bolstered this outlook.

feed.title: Humane's AI Pin, Dubbed As Potential 'iPhone Killer' Dies This Month As Company Sells To HP For $116 Million Amid Poor Sales And Scathing Reviews - HP  ( NYSE:HPQ )
